description: Responsible for designing PCBs, assembling electronic circuits, integrating sensors and microcontrollers, and troubleshooting hardware for robotic systems. Worked closely with the mechanical and programming teams to develop reliable electronic solutions, contributing to the team's qualification for the 2025 Indonesian Robot ABU Indonesia (KRAI) Competition.

Provided technical support for broadcasting operations by maintaining computer systems, network connectivity, and audio equipment. Assisted in managing broadcasting activities and ensured smooth operation of digital media and technical infrastructure during radio programs and events.
